files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ SHELL := /bin/bash
 # `make` should build the binary by default.
 .DEFAULT_GOAL := build
 
-.PHONY: build gog gogcli fmt fmt-check lint test ci tools
+.PHONY: build gog gogcli gog-help fmt fmt-check lint test ci tools
 
 BIN_DIR := $(CURDIR)/bin
 BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/gog
@@ -28,6 +28,9 @@ gog: build
 
 gogcli: gog
 
+gog-help: build
+	@$(BIN) --help
+
 tools:
 	@mkdir -p $(TOOLS_DIR)
 	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install mvdan.cc/gofumpt@v0.9.2
